RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
DEPARTMENT OF REGULATION
CENTRAL OFFICE, MUMBAI

Ref.No.DOR.COMP.REC.18/21.06.012/2026-27
June 15, 2026

All Commercial Banks operating in Karnataka State

State-Specific Circular - General Compliance and Reporting

1. State-Specific Directive
Due to local regulatory adjustments, all branches located within the state of Karnataka must prominently display the revised Customer Rights Policy board in Kannada and English.

2. Action Required
- Branch managers must print and display the updated Customer Rights Policy board in the main banking hall.
- The display must be clearly visible to all walk-in customers.
- A photograph (screenshot/image) of the displayed board must be submitted as evidence.

3. Scope and Timeline
This applies exclusively to branches within Karnataka (State Code 29). Compliance must be achieved within 30 days.

Yours faithfully,
(Anand Kumar)
Chief General Manager
